testcase.name: test_multichip_two_layer_stacked_prefill_layout_perf[blackhole-mesh_device0-device_params0]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/ttnn/cpp/ttnn/operations/matmul/device/matmul_device_operation.cpp:1517: (shard_shape[1] / in0_tile.get_width()) %
